See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 2422221 => 'Cuvette', 2422222 => 'Likouala/Sangha', 2422223 => 'Pool', 2422224 => 'Plateaux', 2422225 => 'Bouenza/Lekoumou/Niari', 2422228 => 'Brazzaville', 2422229 => 'Pointe-Noire', ];
